subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Celtic at sea, 1912-12-13
subcodes.first_line: In America, I stated that the Balkan War was the beginning of the world war to which you refer
subcodes.first_line_orig: من در امریکا گفتم که جنگ بالکان مقدمهٴ آن حرب عمومی است
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @predictions and prophecies
